description.value:
A spell scroll bearing the spell Bless (Level 1).

When you use an action to read the scroll, the spell is cast at its base level. After the spell is cast, the scroll crumbles to dust.

If the spell is not on your class's spell list, you must make a DC 11 Intelligence (Arcana) check or the casting fails and the scroll is not consumed.

Spell lists: Cleric, Paladin
